executors.name: HelloWorld
executors.code: console.log('=== Hello World ==='); console.log('trigger:', ctx.message ? 'message' : 'round'); console.log('params:', JSON.stringify(ctx.params)); console.log('shared:', JSON.stringify(ctx.shared)); console.log('chatLen:', ctx.chat?.length); if (ctx.message) console.log('speaker:', ctx.message?.name, '|', ctx.message?.mes?.slice(0, 50)); return { hello: true, time: Date.now() };
